title: Top Dividend Stocks: Oneok Checks the Boxes With A Sizable 6% Yield
text: Oneok is the focus of this week's Income investor, boasting strong fundamentals, modest growth and an impressive 6% dividend stock yield. Headquartered in Tulsa, Okla.

title: ONEOK: 50 Years Of Dividends, Yielding 5.77%, Could Be Prime For An Acquisition
text: ONEOK's dividend can be traced back to 1972 as it has paid 50 years of dividends. OKE is an income investor's dream as its dividend has grown from $0.31 to $3.43 since 2000.

title: ONEOK: The Good And The Bad Of Higher Gas Prices
text: Upon entering 2022, ONEOK was on significantly improved footings than during 2021 and 2020 with their dividend sustainability far better. Higher gas prices have been wonderful for the energy sector as a whole, although they have not necessarily helped materially for this midstream company.

title: The Best Energy Dividend Stock for a Lifetime of Passive Income

title: ONEOK to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
text: TULSA, Okla. , Aug. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE) will participate in the following investor conferences in August 2022: Aug. 11: Goldman Sachs Power, Utilities, MLPs and Pipelines Conference.

title: Cautiously Optimistic About ONEOK's Growth Potential
text: Oneok has a respectable portfolio of NGL assets well positioned in some of the highest margin markets in the country. The company's substantial spare capacity represents a low cost potential source of growth.
